use_cases: Display activity metrics on dashboards for SaaS and analytics platforms
Track and visualize user engagement trends over weekly, monthly, or yearly periods
Monitor productivity and usage patterns in team collaboration tools
Show performance metrics in fintech and e-commerce analytics
Present engagement data in educational or content platforms
ai_summary: A responsive activity chart card component that renders activity data as an animated bar chart with staggered Framer Motion animations. Built on shadcn/ui components including Card, DropdownMenu, and Button with theming support. Features normalized bar heights based on maximum values and a dropdown selector for filtering time ranges. Designed for dashboards and analytics use cases across SaaS, fintech, and media platforms.
